title: Merge K Sorted Lists

    def mergeKLists(self, A):

hints: Use a min heap to efficiently get the smallest element from all lists at each step.
Initialize the heap with the first node from each non-empty linked list.
At each step, extract the minimum node from the heap and add it to the result.
If the extracted node has a next node, add that next node to the heap.
Continue until the heap is empty.
This approach achieves O(N log K) complexity where N is total nodes and K is number of lists.
